title: Hiriluk’s Soup and Chopper’s Care
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on hiriluk’s soup and chopper’s care, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Hiriluk’s Soup and Chopper’s Care. Chopper tries to save Hiriluk with the mushroom he believes is medicine, turning love and ignorance into tragedy. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Does the Amjudake soup taste good?

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh eh... don't worry, good medicine is supposed to taste bad. That's just proof of their

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Why, I can already feel energy surgery through my whole body!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: That's the first time I've seen it do that.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: This is it! This is the reaction I've been waiting for!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I've been waiting over 30 years for this...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I did it, Chopperr! My research is complete!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: I can bring the cherry blossoms to this winter island now!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Now stay put while I go out for a little bit.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: you're in far more critical condition than I am, what with all those wounds of yours!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Doc was real happy... I actually cured somebody!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You're going to be a wonderful doctor!

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: This country's in a real crisis right now.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Yeah, I heard. The MD-20s have apparently all collapsed from some illness.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: Ridiculous... just better to leave things be, it'll solve itself sooner or later.

summary: This part highlights hiriluk’s soup and chopper’s care and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
